nodes.label: MIDI noteOn
nodes.description: Incoming MIDI noteOn event triggers voice start

nodes.label: Extract Note Number
nodes.description: Reads MIDI note number (0-127) from HiseEvent

nodes.label: SliderPack[128]
nodes.description: 128-element slider array (one per MIDI note), range 0.0-1.0, default all 1.0

nodes.label: Lookup value[noteNumber]
nodes.description: Indexes SliderPack using note number as direct array index, returns slider value

nodes.label: Update Display Index
nodes.description: Sets displayed slider index for UI highlighting (no audio effect)

nodes.label: Modulation Output
nodes.description: Voice start modulation value (0.0-1.0), scaled by Intensity
